facade_description: 23 St Andrew St presents a house-form, semi-detached facade within the Kensington Market HCD. The street elevation spans roughly 5.2 metres across 1 storeys and is capped by a cross-gable, consistent with its house-form, semi-detached typology. The facade reads primarily as unknown in a not visible — site under active construction palette, laid in running bond with light grey mortar joints. The opening rhythm is vertically ordered across the facade, using unknown. Character-defining facade elements include cornice.
